lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: [player name]! So glad you could make it. I really do appreciate you rounding up all those monkeys for us.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: I am grateful for your help, [player name]. If you could free up an inventory space, I wish to reward you.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: I am grateful for your help, [player name]. As proof of my gratitude, I have arranged a reward for you!

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Also, King Awowogei brought gifts from Ape Atoll as an apology for the trouble they caused. But I think you should receive them instead.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Ah, [player name]. I hope you are enjoying the party?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is going to happen with the monkeys?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: It turns out that on the way to King Awowogei, Postie Pete was called off for an urgent request for Molly. Her evil twin had escaped again and she was looking for an adventurer to help.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: In the process of teleporting, he left the letter behind and these monkeys found it.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: They couldn't understand the letter so they took it to one of their elders, Mizaru, to translate. But 'Monster' didn't translate, so they assumed it said 'Monkey'.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: So instead of a party invitation they interpreted it as a threat from an organisation called Humans Against Monkeys! They stole some amulets of humanspeak, then decided to come here and put an end to it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That explains what happened, I suppose. How did you find all of this out?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Another elder, Kikazaru, found the letter. And once he understood the situation, he went straight to King Awowogei himself. The King is over in the corner if you want to speak to him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. I'll go enjoy the party now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me more reward items?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: I think that is everything I have for you.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: I have given you what you can hold. You may wish to visit Diango, in Draynor Village, to collect more rewards in a more convenient setting.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: I have nothing more for you.
